【都市+黑道+大佬+一手遮天+爽文+年代+无敌】
【原书名  黑道：从征服丰满美妇开始】
小时候我爸经常跟我说，江湖路就是一条不归路，这条路很难走，没几个人能有善终，我一直不理解这句话的意思。
反而觉得江湖上有兄弟，有女人，够威风，一直到有一天，我亲眼看着他被人砍死在了电玩城门口，我才明白了这句话的意思。
江湖路就是一条不归路，可我无路可走，只能走上这条路。
既然走上了这条路，我就要做最大最狠的那个。
一双铁拳，打出一个出人头地，权势滔天。
我叫陈江河！
这个时代，我来，我见证，我征服！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/015c2b1d6541c5d58fad66bfec137be0","author":"祝融必火","author_id":"","book_id":"7418476081222519833","book_name":"从烂仔到黑道枭雄","book_short_name":"铁拳陈江河","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"27.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7418476204757369369","read_count":"270470","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3181147"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"1244","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o18e5ab65321f5cbe6fe7431fb50780f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259486&x-signature=1J2wFkuRFUHTPONjixLFHasW164%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96359566093","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"900"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144445BC21F29D43C184DAF851"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读48小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":173143,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8716},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"75156293761
